mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_case ( project_id, task_id, version_name, module_name, case_title, priority, case_type, precondition, steps, expected_result, test_data, source_chunk_ids, ai_score, review_status, deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{taskId}, #{versionName}, #{moduleName}, #{caseTitle}, #{priority}, #{caseType}, #{precondition}, #{steps}, #{expectedResult}, #{testData}, #{sourceChunkIds}, #{aiScore}, #{reviewStatus}, false, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, task_id, version_name, module_name, case_title, priority, case_type, precondition, steps, expected_result, test_data, source_chunk_ids, ai_score, review_status, deleted, created_at, updated_at FROM test_case WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND deleted = false ORDER BY id ASC
